title: jasminum extensum
intro: Jasminum extensum, also known as the Indian jasmine or star jasmine, is a type of flowering plant native to India and Southeast Asia. It is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, making it useful in treating various health conditions such as fever, colds, and skin issues. The plant has been found to have various health benefits, including reducing stress and anxiety, improving sleep quality, and supporting immune function. Herbal preparations of Jasminum extensum include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
